prompt:
Create a cinematic vertical-friendly background image for a faceless short-form video.

Short title: Panic Reset: 10 Scripture Declarations
Niche: Faith + Psychology + Encouragement
Tone: encouraging, calm, biblical

Requirements:
- No text
- No logos
- No watermarks
- No readable signage
- Clean center composition for captions
- Strong emotional clarity
- Vertical-video friendly composition
- Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts
- Avoid extreme close-up faces
- Prefer symbolic, atmospheric, or scenic imagery over identifiable people

Style:
cinematic, dramatic but tasteful, soft lighting, polished, realistic

Short script context:
Say this when panic hits. Speaking truth out loud interrupts the anxious loop and steadies your breath. Repeat after me: God is with me. I will not fear. I give You my worry. Your peace guards my heart and mind. You are my refuge and my fortress. You restore my soul. You strengthen me for this moment. Your perfect love casts out fear. I cast my cares on You because You care for me. Nothing can separate me from Your love. Again, peace is mine in Christ. Stay here as long as you need. You’re not failing—you’re being held.
